tavily.answer: The latest conflict in Gaza involves the IDF deepening its occupation, displacing more Palestinians to less territory. Israel has halted humanitarian aid to Gaza until further notice due to the security situation and Iranian missile fire. The Board of Peace has stated that UNRWA has no place in Gaza's future, while Israel has launched a pilot program for returning residents. Over 1,000 people have been killed in Israeli operations in Gaza since the ceasefire last October.
